name: ctc-copilot
description: Toggle GitHub Copilot Chat through the CTC credit proxy (bill the shared pool instead of your own seat).

ctc.proxyHost.description: Host of the central CTC proxy (e.g. ctc.internal). Falls back to HTTPS_PROXY from ~/.config/ctc/env if empty.

ctc.proxyPort.description: Port of the central CTC proxy.

ctc.listenPort.description: Local port the CTC identity shim listens on (VS Code's http.proxy points here while CTC is on).

ctc.gheDomain.description: Your GitHub Enterprise domain (e.g. sita.ghe.com). Only *.<domain> traffic is routed through CTC; everything else goes direct. Empty routes all traffic through CTC.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run copy-shim && npm run compile
